name: student-erp-app
description: Student ERP mobile UI prototype (Dashboard + Attendance) built with HTML/CSS/JS

scripts.build: npx cap copy android && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run build && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run build && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.apk:run: npm run apk:install && npm run apk:start
